channel.title: Notifications on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Notifications on Pi Stack

item.title: Novu vs Apprise vs Ntfy: Self-Hosted Notification Infrastructure Guide 2026
item.description: Every application needs a way to reach its users. Whether it’s a password reset email, an order confirmation SMS, an in-app notification badge, or a Slack alert when your server goes down — notifications are the backbone of user engagement. The problem? Most teams wire up each channel separately, managing different APIs, rate limits, and credentials for every provider.
